curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies only src/lib.rs in the split_at method of Arena<T>. The fix stores the result of selected.borrow() in a temporary variable so the same index is used consistently. No sibling files exist — nano-arena is a single-file library crate. Vulnerability class use-after-free (CWE-416) confirmed: the advisory explicitly states the bug enables 'use-after-frees' through unsound aliasing violations when Borrow returns different indices on successive calls.
